scripts.setup:local: npm run infra:up && npm run api:generate && npm run api:migrate
scripts.dev:app: npm run infra:up && concurrently -n api,matchmaking,client -c blue,magenta,green "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:matchmaking" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.dev:api: npm run api:generate && npm run api:migrate && node --env-file=.env scripts/run-with-root-env.mjs npm --prefix apps/api run start:dev
scripts.dev:api:local: npm run infra:up && npm run dev:api
scripts.dev:backend: npm run infra:up && concurrently -n api,matchmaking -c blue,magenta "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:matchmaking"
scripts.dev:matchmaking: node --env-file=.env scripts/run-with-root-env.mjs npm --prefix apps/matchmaking run start:dev
scripts.api:generate: node --env-file=.env scripts/run-with-root-env.mjs npm --prefix apps/api run db:generate
scripts.api:migrate: npm run infra:up && node --env-file=.env scripts/run-with-root-env.mjs npm --prefix apps/api run db:migrate
scripts.api:migrate:dev: npm run infra:up && node --env-file=.env scripts/run-with-root-env.mjs npm --prefix apps/api run db:migrate:dev
scripts.api:studio: node --env-file=.env scripts/run-with-root-env.mjs npm --prefix apps/api run db:studio
